title: Uhlolo "Leben in Deutschland": Imibuzo Engu-310 Ihunyushelwe ku-isiZulu
description: Uhlolo lobuzwe baseJalimane "Leben in Deutschland": imibuzo engu-310 ngezilimi ezingu-100+. Lungiselela ngesiZulu — mahhala futhi ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
hero_sub: Yonke imibuzo esemthethweni engu-310 yohlolo lwe-"Leben in Deutschland", ihunyushelwe esiZulwini. Funda kalula, ngejubane lakho, awudingi i-inthanethi.
hero_note: Mahhala · Isebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi · Imibuzo yazo zonke izifundazwe ezingu-16
hero_img_alt: Isikrini sasekhaya se-app ngesiZulu: yonke imibuzo, imibuzo yesifunda, izintandokazi, izibalo
lang_p1: Wonke umbuzo uboniswa ngesiJalimane — njengasekuhloleni kwangempela — kanye nenguqulo yesiZulu ngezansi nje. Ufunda kokubili izinto kanye namagama aqondile ozowabona ekuhloleni.
lang_p2: I-app inikeza izinguqulo ngezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 — okubalulekile ukuthi olwakho selukhona.
demo_t: EJalimane, abantu bavunyelwe ukugxeka uhulumeni obala ngoba …
demo_caption: Umbuzo woku-1 kwangu-310 · fihla inguqulo ngokuthinta okukodwa
feat_h2: Konke okudingayo ukuze ulungiselele — ku-app eyodwa
feat_lede: Amakhadi afanayo nawe-app: alula, acacile, akukho okwengeziwe.
feat1_p: Imibuzo evamile engu-300 kanye nemibuzo engu-10 yesifundazwe sakho — ikhathalogi esemthethweni ephelele.
feat2_p: Uhlolo lokuzilolonga: imibuzo engu-33 kanye nomkhawulo wemizuzu engu-60 — imithetho efanayo nohlolo olusemthethweni.
feat3_p: Ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye uyabona ngokushesha ukuthi ibilungile noma ayilungile — funda ngenkathi uqhubeka.
feat4_p: Imodi ekhethekile enemibuzo kuphela oyiphendule ngokungalungile — vala izikhala zakho ngempumelelo.
feat5_p: Maka imibuzo oyithola inzima futhi ubuyele kuyo noma nini lapho uthanda.
feat6_p: Funda kusitimela esingaphansi komhlaba, emugqeni, noma kuphi — awudingi i-inthanethi nhlobo.
scr_lede: Isixhumi sibonakalayo singesiZulu. Idizayini ezolile, ekhanyayo engenalutho olwengeziwe.
scr3_alt: Uhlolo lokuzilolonga olunomshini wesikhathi wemizuzu engu-60
step1_p: Faka mahhala, ukhethe isiZulu kanye nesifundazwe sakho.
step2_p: Funda imibuzo nezinguqulo, maka enzima futhi ubuyekeze amaphutha akho.
step3_p: Zihlole emodini yokuhlola — bese ungena ekuhloleni kwangempela uzethemba.
disc1_p: Lena iphrojekthi yemfundo eyimfihlo, hhayi i-app esemthethweni yeHhovisi Likazwelonke Lokufuduka Nababaleki (BAMF). I-app ayihlangene nanoma yiziphi iziphathimandla zikahulumeni futhi ayimeleli zikhungo ezisemthethweni.
disc2_p: Imibuzo yokuhlola isekelwe kwikhathalogi yemibuzo esemthethweni ye-BAMF. Okuqukethwe kwasekuqaleni kushicilelwe ngesiJalimane esikhungweni sokuhlola se-inthanethi se-BAMF.
disc3_p: Izinguqulo zenziwe yi-AI ukuze zisekele abasebenzisi abanolwazi oluncane lwesiJalimane futhi zingaba namaphutha. Uma ukholelwa ukuthi inguqulo kufanele ithuthukiswe, ungazisa umthuthukisi ngqo kusukela ku-app. Umbhalo wesiJalimane wokuqala wemibuzo kuphela ogunyaziwe.
disc4_p: Okuqukethwe kwale-app kuhloselwe kuphela ukulungiselela ukuhlola. Yize sikulungiselele ngokucophelela, asiqinisekisi ukunemba, ukuphelela noma ukuba namuhla kolwazi; noma yikuphi ukubophezeleka kokulimala okuqondile noma okungaqondile okuvela ekusebenziseni le-app kuyancishwa. Izinto zikahulumeni ezisemthethweni ze-BAMF kuphela ezigunyaziwe.
f_about: Ukulungiselela uhlolo lwe-"Leben in Deutschland" (Einbürgerungstest) ngolimi lwakho lwebele. I-app evela ku-85apps.
